description: Creates a subscript annotation referencing a step annotation. Marks a subordinate or sub-step at a position that refers to a previously defined annotationstep, with optional comment text.
utility: Reference steps as substeps in multi-level step solutions

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Position of the substep reference, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: stepRef
arguments.description: Reference to an annotationstep variable (e.g., astep_1)

arguments.name: comment
arguments.description: Optional comment text displayed with the substep

arguments.name: style
arguments.description: Optional styling modifiers (c for color, s() for style, dash, fadeout, etc.)

examples.expression: astep_1 = annotationstep(at(1,1), size(3), "1"), stepsub(at(3,1), astep_1, "apply rule")
